race.description: Dlg Aluminium & Glazing Country Boosted Hcp (C1)
race.comment: JUST HEAR ME OUT (4) has good early speed and draws the A1. Will bounce straight to the front and will prove very tough to reel in if left alone. LONDON BOY (2) doesn't win out of turn but has returned in good order this prep, beaten narrowly in both runs back at Goulburn. Peaking now and gets in well with the 2kg claimer reuniting. KENDALIA (1) got too far back at Wagga when resuming but did start to warm up late. Better with that under his belt and Boudvillain's booking signals stable confidence. SCREEN SPIRIT (9) goth things back on track here last start when chasing gamely into second. Guymer sticks and gets weight off. Can give this a big shake. FORREST DANCER (5) broke his maiden in fine style last start at Wagga when finishing over the top. Harder here but gets in light with the 3kg claimer engaged and has upside. Not taking lightly.

favourite.name: Just Hear Me Out
favourite.silk_colours: YELLOW WITH GREEN SHAMROCK, RED AND GREEN HOOPED SLEEVES, RED CAP
